Idioma.LB_CampoCajaEfectivo: You must select a Petty Cash
Idioma.LB_CampoReferencia: The reference must not be blank
Idioma.LB_CampoMonto: The amount requested should not be blank
Idioma.LB_CampoMontoMayor0: The amount requested must be greater than zero
Idioma.LB_CampoTipoCambio: The exchange rate can not be blank
Idioma.LB_CampoFactorConversion: The conversion factor can not be blank
